data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled. Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. I'll run only the `Integration` category.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with dotnet test

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is enabled in Directory.Build.props). The tests have categories "Unit" and "Integration" â€” the user wants only the Integration tests.

With MSTest and `dotnet test`, I can filter by category using `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-d126bf04dfbc42c0af763de8751f60f3 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with dotnet test", "initial_wait": 60}
